title: Student Management System
instructions: Complete the missing GET route to fetch all students from the provided data.json file.

starterCode.index.html: Students

hints: Check the fetch URL in index.html.
Use fs.readFileSync to read the data.json file.
Use res.json() to send the data.
explanation: HTML me fetch('/students') diya tha, isliye backend me app.get('/students') banana tha. fs module ka use karke humne data.json read kiya aur JSON response bhej diya.

mcqs.question: Which method is used to send JSON response in Express?

title: Hospital Management - POST API
instructions: Implement a POST route to add a new patient to the database.

starterCode.index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<body>
    <input id='name' placeholder='Patient Name'>
    <button onclick='add()'>Add</button>
    <script>
        function add() {
            const name = document.getElementById('name').value;
            fetch('/patients', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: {'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
                body: JSON.stringify({ name })
            }).then(() => alert('Added!'));
        }
    </script>
</body>
</html>

hints: Use app.post() to define the route.
Don't forget to use express.json() middleware (already added).
explanation: Isme hume naya patient add karna tha. POST method use kiya kyuki data send ho raha tha. req.body se data liya aur push karke file save kar di.

mcqs.question: Which middleware is needed to parse JSON body?
